title: Hugo and the Missing Lab Mouse
synopsis: Hugo helps his scientist mom find her missing lab mouse by following clues and learning about scientific tools and observation.

pages.text: Hugo loved visiting Mom's science lab. Today, something was wrong. Mom looked worried. 'Pip the mouse is missing!' she said. 'I need to find him before the big science meeting.' Hugo wanted to help. He put on his detective hat. 'Don't worry, Mom. I'll help you find Pip!' Hugo said. Mom smiled. 'Thank you, Hugo. You're a great detective.' Hugo looked around the busy lab. There were so many places a tiny mouse could hide. Beakers bubbled on tables. Microscopes sat on shelves. Books were stacked everywhere. 'Where should we start looking?' Hugo asked. Mom pointed to Pip's empty cage. 'Let's look for clues near his home first.'

illustration.description: A cluttered science laboratory filled with scientific equipment, beakers, test tubes, microscopes, books, charts, and lab tools scattered everywhere. Hugo, a boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes, wearing a detective hat, stands next to his mom near an empty mouse cage. The scene is packed with detailed objects to search through, viewed from a magnifying glass perspective.
illustration.alt: Hugo and his mom in a busy science lab looking at an empty mouse cage

pages.text: Hugo bent down to look at Pip's cage. He saw tiny mouse footprints on the table! 'Look, Mom! Clue number one!' Hugo said, pointing at the little prints. The footprints led away from the cage toward a big pile of science books. Hugo followed them carefully. He loved being a detective. Mom watched proudly as Hugo examined each tiny print. 'You're very observant, Hugo,' she said. 'That's an important skill for scientists too.' Hugo felt excited. Maybe he could be a scientist detective when he grew up! The footprints stopped at the edge of the table. 'Where did Pip go next?' Hugo wondered aloud.

illustration.description: A detailed close-up view of a laboratory table surface crowded with scientific instruments, papers, pencils, rulers, calculators, and small lab equipment. Hugo, with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes, is crouched down examining tiny mouse footprints on the table surface. The scene shows many small objects and tools from a magnifying glass perspective.
illustration.alt: Hugo examining mouse footprints on a cluttered lab table

pages.text: Hugo looked up and saw something interesting. A plant on the windowsill had nibbled leaves! 'Clue number two!' Hugo announced. 'Pip must have climbed up here to eat.' Mom nodded. 'Good thinking! Mice love to nibble on plants.' Hugo used a magnifying glass to look closer. He found more tiny bite marks on the leaves. There were also small brown pellets near the plant. 'What are these?' Hugo asked. 'Those are mouse droppings,' Mom explained. 'They show us Pip was definitely here.' Hugo felt proud of his detective work. He was getting closer to finding Pip! But where had the little mouse gone after his snack?

illustration.description: A windowsill area packed with potted plants, gardening tools, watering cans, seed packets, plant labels, and scientific measuring tools. Hugo, with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes, holds a large magnifying glass examining nibbled plant leaves. The busy composition shows many detailed objects and clues scattered around the plants.
illustration.alt: Hugo using a magnifying glass to examine nibbled plant leaves on a crowded windowsill

pages.text: Hugo heard a tiny sound. Squeak, squeak! It came from behind a tall bookshelf filled with science books. 'I hear something!' Hugo whispered excitedly. He and Mom quietly walked toward the bookshelf. The squeaking got louder. Hugo carefully moved some books aside. Behind them was a small opening in the wall. 'Pip might be hiding in there,' Mom whispered. Hugo got on his hands and knees to look inside the opening. It was dark, but he could see something moving. 'I think I found him!' Hugo said softly. He didn't want to scare the little mouse. The squeaking was definitely coming from inside the wall.

illustration.description: A towering bookshelf crammed with science books, journals, binders, lab notebooks, and scientific reference materials. Hugo, with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes, kneels beside scattered books on the floor, peering into a small opening in the wall. The scene includes many detailed objects like bookmarks, paper clips, sticky notes, and reading glasses from a search-and-find perspective.
illustration.alt: Hugo looking into a wall opening behind a bookshelf full of science books

pages.text: Hugo had an idea. 'What if we use science to get Pip out?' he asked Mom. Mom smiled. 'What do you suggest, detective?' Hugo thought hard. 'Pip likes food. Maybe we can use his favorite treat!' Mom found some sunflower seeds. She placed them near the opening. 'Good plan, Hugo. Now we wait and observe, just like real scientists do.' They sat very quietly. Soon, a tiny pink nose appeared. Then whiskers. Then Pip's whole furry body came out to eat the seeds! 'We did it!' Hugo cheered quietly. 'We used detective work and science together!' Mom gently picked up Pip and put him safely back in his cage.

illustration.description: The laboratory floor area cluttered with scientific supplies, measuring tools, notebooks, pencils, sunflower seeds scattered around, lab equipment, and various small objects. Hugo, with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes, sits cross-legged watching a small white mouse near some seeds. His mom kneels nearby. The detailed scene shows many tiny objects and tools from a busy organized perspective.
illustration.alt: Hugo and his mom watching Pip the mouse eating sunflower seeds on the cluttered lab floor

pages.text: Mom gave Hugo a big hug. 'Thank you for being such a wonderful detective-scientist,' she said. 'You used observation, following clues, and problem-solving - just like real scientists!' Hugo felt very proud. He had helped solve the mystery and learned about science too. Pip squeaked happily in his cage, munching on fresh sunflower seeds. 'Can I help you with more science mysteries?' Hugo asked. 'Absolutely!' Mom replied. 'Every good scientist needs a detective partner.' Hugo decided that being a scientist-detective was the best job ever. He couldn't wait for their next mystery adventure together. As Mom got ready for her meeting, Hugo promised Pip he would visit again soon.

illustration.description: The complete science laboratory view with Hugo, who has straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes, and his mom celebrating near Pip's cage. The entire lab is filled with countless detailed objects: beakers, test tubes, microscopes, books, plants, tools, charts, measuring devices, and scientific equipment creating a busy, organized composition perfect for searching and finding hidden objects.
illustration.alt: Hugo and his mom celebrating in the crowded science lab with Pip safely back in his cage

metadata.illustrationStyle: detailed hidden objects, visual clues, busy organized composition, search and find, detailed environment, many small objects, magnifying glass perspective, cluttered room or scene

questions.question: What was missing from Mom's science lab?
questions.explanation: Pip the mouse was missing from his cage in Mom's science lab.

questions.question: What was the first clue Hugo found?
questions.explanation: Hugo first found tiny mouse footprints on the table near Pip's cage.

questions.question: What tool did Hugo use to examine the plant leaves?
questions.explanation: Hugo used a magnifying glass to look closer at the nibbled plant leaves.

questions.question: Where was Pip hiding?
questions.explanation: Pip was hiding in a small opening in the wall behind the tall bookshelf.

questions.question: What did Hugo and Mom use to get Pip to come out?
questions.explanation: They used sunflower seeds, Pip's favorite treat, to lure him out of his hiding place.
